Label: Severe ARDS context PaO2/FiO2 less than 150

Label: Severe ARDS context PaO2/FiO2 less than 150
Definition: PaO₂/FiO₂ <150 mmHg on PEEP ≥5 cmH₂O for >12–36h. Required for prone benefit (PROSEVA) and VV-ECMO consideration (EOLIA).

Label: Conservative fluid management strategy

Label: Conservative fluid management strategy
Auto_Definition: The promotion of optimal fluid balance, especially in the inpatient setting, through ongoing clinical assessment and monitoring of intravascular volume, and accurate replacement of fluid losses.

Label: Transpulmonary pressure monitoring
Definition: Oesophageal manometry to measure PL = Paw − Peso. Enables individualised PEEP and P-SILI detection.

Label: Transpulmonary pressure monitoring

Label: Driving pressure
Definition: ΔP = Pplat − PEEP. Tidal volume normalised to functional lung size. ΔP >15 cmH₂O independently predicts ARDS mortality (Amato NEJM 2015, PMID 25693014).
